ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "est" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea level pressure in inches */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover as a percentage */,
  "events" TEXT /* Any notable weather events */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_collection_method FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
